subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion! The letter filled with lamentation and plaintive cries hath been received. The outcries and supplications have reached unto the canopy of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس قدیم نامه پر ناله و حنین وصول یافت فریاد و فغان بعنان آسمان رسیده
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
